method.fr: D'après les entrées/sorties de ce niveau sur le wiki source.

en.name: Level 53 — Alone
en.shortDescription: A single house suspended in an eternal morning, where a trapped wanderer lives on mysteriously restocking food and faceless visitors.
en.atmosphere: An isolated home under perpetual dawn: peaceful yet profoundly lonely, comfort at war with inescapable confinement.
en.tips: Rescue is possible via outside contact — leave written messages where they can be found. The faceless visitors mean no immediate harm.
